caption: A man wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a red bowtie, and a tall, grey, stylized wig sits in a recording studio. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears prominently on the left and right sides of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man continues talking, shifting his facial expression and gesturing with his right hand toward his chest. He remains in the same seated position throughout, with the camera angle remaining constant as he interacts with an unseen person or audience.
